Variables.Name: SourcePose
Variables.Description: Bones to use for driving parameters based on their transform

Variables.Name: SourceBones
Variables.Description: Bone to use for driving parameters based on its orientation

Variables.Name: bOnlyDriveSelectedBones
Variables.Description: If we should filter bones to be driven using the DrivenBonesFilter array

Variables.Name: OnlyDriveBones
Variables.Description: If bFilterDrivenBones is specified, only these bones will be modified by this node

Variables.Name: EvalSpaceBone
Variables.Description:
Optional other bone space to use when reading SourceBone transform.
	 	If not specified, we just use local space of SourceBone (ie relative to parent bone)

Variables.Name: DriveSource
Variables.Description: Which part of the transform is read

Variables.Name: DriveOutput
Variables.Description: Whether we should drive poses or curves

Variables.Name: PoseTargets
Variables.Description: Targets used to compare with current pose and drive morphsposes
